examples: The antiserum was specific for atrazine, the cross-reactivity of the antiserum to propazine and simazine was 93 % and 8 %, respectively.
Simazine residues in meat and meat products for export were detected by GC, and the method is simple, rapid and has good precision and accuracy.
It is proposed clearly that the interaction between simazine and CAT has been verified as consistent with static quenching procedure and the quenching mechanism is related to the energy transfer.
